plugins.name: calibrate
plugins.description: Reviews the current conversation and suggests targeted updates to skills, instruction files, or memory based on corrections and patterns

plugins.name: personalise
plugins.description: Takes any external input and recommends how to adapt it to your specific workspace, voice, tech stack, and goals

plugins.name: tweak
plugins.description: Injects a live controls panel into single-file HTML output with sliders for speed, type sizes, density, glow, roundness, then bakes values back into source CSS
